title: Deployment of Seafarers. The Department shall allow the deployment of
content: 26 seafarers to the following: ships, whether Philippine-registered or foreign-registered, 27 navigating foreign seas, or installations located offshore or on the high-seas, whose 28 owners/employers are compliant with international laws and standards. 29 30
